diagrams.title: Singly Linked List Structure
diagrams.description: Shows basic structure of a singly linked list with 4 nodes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding node structure and how nodes are connected through pointers

diagrams.title: Node Insertion at Beginning
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of inserting a new node at the beginning
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing pointer manipulation during insertion operation

diagrams.title: Node Deletion at Beginning
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of deleting the first node
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to properly remove first node without memory leak

diagrams.title: Doubly Linked List
diagrams.description: Shows bidirectional pointers in a doubly linked list
elements: Node with three parts: prev pointer, data, next pointer
diagrams.purpose: Understanding two-way traversal capability of doubly linked lists

diagrams.title: Circular Linked List
diagrams.description: Shows the circular connection where last node points back to first
elements: Last node's next points to HEAD
diagrams.purpose: Understanding circular data structure and its loop nature
